title: Time Value of Money
description: Understand the fundamental concept that money today is worth more than the same amount in the future. Master present value, future value, discounting, and their applications in finance.
learningObjectives: Explain why money has time value and the role of interest rates
Calculate present value and future value of single cash flows
Apply discounting to series of cash flows (annuities and perpetuities)
Understand continuous compounding and its mathematical properties
Value bonds and other fixed income instruments using discounting
